title: Brachystephanus schliebenii

The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues, due to its potential health benefits of reducing fever, alleviating pain, and combating microbial infections. The bioactive constituents of Brachystephanus schliebenii include diterpenoids and flavonoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
